Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Many SWE-bench-Passing PRs would not be merged 54 upvotes, 3 comments
  2. Physicist Astrid Eichhorn is a leader in the field of asymptotic safety 100 upvotes, 14 comments
  3. Fungal Electronics (2021) 51 upvotes, 6 comments
  4. Don't post generated/AI-edited comments. HN is for conversation between humans. 2156 upvotes, 822 comments
  5. Show HN: I built a tool that watches webpages and exposes changes as RSS 126 upvotes, 37 comments
  6. Temporal: A nine-year journey to fix time in JavaScript 433 upvotes, 153 comments
  7. Show HN: Open-source browser for AI agents 91 upvotes, 27 comments
  8. Making WebAssembly a first-class language on the Web 336 upvotes, 131 comments
  9. How we hacked McKinsey's AI platform 357 upvotes, 145 comments
  10. Building a TB-303 from Scratch 203 upvotes, 82 comments
  11. BitNet: 100B Param 1-Bit model for local CPUs 281 upvotes, 147 comments
  12. Show HN: Vanilla JavaScript refinery simulator built to explain job to my kids 79 upvotes, 37 comments
  13. Show HN: Satellite imagery object detection using text prompts 31 upvotes, 12 comments
  14. Show HN: Klaus – OpenClaw on a VM, batteries included 103 upvotes, 60 comments
  15. 5,200 holes carved into a Peruvian mountain left by an ancient economy 76 upvotes, 42 comments
  16. Preliminary data from a longitudinal AI impact study 14 upvotes, 4 comments
  17. Google closes deal to acquire Wiz 194 upvotes, 133 comments
  18. Entities enabling scientific fraud at scale (2025) 244 upvotes, 174 comments
  19. Launch HN: Sentrial (YC W26) – Catch AI agent failures before your users do 22 upvotes, 9 comments
  20. Launch HN: Prism (YC X25) – Workspace and API to generate and edit videos 30 upvotes, 15 comments
  21. Personal Computer by Perplexity 65 upvotes, 42 comments
  22. Britain is ejecting hereditary nobles from Parliament after 700 years 84 upvotes, 59 comments
  23. I was interviewed by an AI bot for a job 75 upvotes, 72 comments
  24. I'm glad the Anthropic fight is happening now 107 upvotes, 121 comments
  25. Atlassian to cut roughly 1,600 jobs in pivot to AI 18 upvotes, 15 comments
  26. Can the Dictionary Keep Up? 5 upvotes, 2 comments
  27. The MacBook Neo 323 upvotes, 546 comments
  28. What Is a Tort? 20 upvotes, 22 comments
  29. Swiss e-voting pilot can't count 2,048 ballots after decryption failure 131 upvotes, 298 comments
  30. Meticulous (YC S21) is hiring to redefine software dev 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 7:00am, 12 March 2026. Source here.
